hero.description_1: I combine a technical approach with an understanding of user experience thanks to my background in design. I enjoy exploring new technologies and quickly putting them into practice.
hero.description_2: I am used to learning independently and taking responsibility for my growth. I easily adapt to new tools and continuously develop my skills in development.

other.api: I design and implement REST APIs: working with routing, handling HTTP requests, validating data, structuring endpoints, and building client–server interaction.
other.principles: I follow SOLID principles and OOP, using design patterns where they improve maintainability and scalability.
other.principles_2: I design applications with a focus on separation of concerns, maintainability, and scalability.

habit_tracker.title: Habit Tracker
habit_tracker.description: An application for tracking habits with user authentication, habit management, and progress statistics.
habit_tracker.goal: The goal of the project was to create a lightweight and fast-to-use habit tracking app.
habit_tracker.quality: Written from scratch, without code generation

features.auth: User registration with email verification via a one-time OTP code and limited number of attempts.
features.pwa: The application is configured as a PWA and can be used on mobile devices like a native app.
features.tracking: Habit tracking interface with daily completion marking and progress visualization.
features.security: Secure user data storage: password and OTP hashing using bcrypt.
features.i18n: Support for multiple languages (Russian and English) with interface switching.
features.validation: Client-side and server-side validation using React Hook Form and Zod.

portfolio_website.title: Portfolio Website
portfolio_website.description: This website was developed using AI tools. The project structure and logic were defined manually, after which neural networks were used to generate components and styles.
portfolio_website.goal: Only the final adjustments were made manually.
